mapper.select: SELECT a.*, t.name as type_name, u.real_name as user_name, CASE a.status WHEN 0 THEN '待审批' WHEN 1 THEN '已通过' WHEN 2 THEN '已拒绝' ELSE '未知' END as status_name FROM approval a LEFT JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, t.name as type_name, u.real_name as user_name, CASE a.status WHEN 0 THEN '待审批' WHEN 1 THEN '已通过' WHEN 2 THEN '已拒绝' ELSE '未知' END as status_name FROM approval a LEFT JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT a.*, t.name as type_name, u.real_name as user_name FROM approval a LEFT JOIN approval_type t ON a.type_id = t.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval (type_id, user_id, title, content, status) VALUES (#{typeId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE approval SET type_id = #{typeId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
